summary: Score sits in the middle band of the reference population.
detail: We summed the effect sizes of 612 height-associated variants present in your sample, weighted by their reported betas, and compared the total against a reference distribution. The score is informational only and not a clinical estimate.

blocks.title: Polygenic score
blocks.interpretation: Slightly above the population median. The middle two-thirds of people fall between -1 and 1.

blocks.title: Not a clinical result
blocks.body: Height is highly polygenic and strongly environmental. This score explains a small fraction of the variation between people and is not a prediction of any individual's height.
